title: pimpinella verticillata
intro: Pimpinella verticillata, also known as Chinese burnet or Chinese burnet saxifrage, is a plant species within the carrot family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches and eye strain, and promoting digestion. Pimpinella verticillata is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
